lion-king.description: This project is part of our professional background prior to founding SENZO. During our time at MPC LONDON, we developed technical setups for world-class <red>FX</red>. This included the development of <bold>procedural rain</bold>, embers, and atmospheric systems. We also performed dust simulations for several shots of the animal stampede sequences. A project that showcases our roots in high-end, <bold>photorealistic cinematic production</bold>.

godzilla.description: This project forms part of our artistic heritage from our time before SENZO. During our tenure at MPC LONDON, we were responsible for the technical execution of massive <bold>crowd simulations</bold>. This included both human units such as ground soldiers and vehicle fleets, including aircraft and helicopters. We ensured realistic movement and interaction within high-stakes action scenes. A masterclass in managing <bold>cinematic <red>FX</red></bold> for larger-scale creature films.

pirates.description: A key milestone in our founders' career path leading up to the creation of SENZO during their time at MPC LONDON. We developed the specialized particle effect for Salazar's decaying character design. Our team also handled advanced <bold>fluid simulations</bold>, including water and foam and created dynamic smoke trails to enhance the supernatural atmosphere of the film. An example of high-level <bold>character <red>FX</red></bold> and environmental integration for Disney.

lays.description: In collaboration with MATHEMATIC, we managed the comprehensive <bold>snow and winter <red>FX</red></bold>. We created the ice trails for Jimmy Fallon's skates and the falling snow systems. Our work included the lighting setups for the reindeer and the holiday houses. We also simulated the dynamics of snowball fights and several snow-covering layers for many of the sequence objects. Delivering <bold>premium visual standards</bold> for high-profile global advertising campaigns.

pepsi.description: In collaboration with SAUVAGE TV, we developed the signature <bold>fire simulations</bold>. We created the dynamic fire trails following icons like Ronaldinho and Messi. Our work featured the technical execution of the fire face and its transitions. We ensured the fire <red>FX</red> felt powerful and integrated within the fast-paced edit. <bold>High-impact visual effects</bold> designed for one of the world's most recognized brands.

kombucha.description: In collaboration with NOZON, we developed the entire <bold>procedural 3D setup</bold> from scratch. We built a custom tool to generate and control the organic growth of plants. This allowed for total artistic direction over timing, variations, and foliage flow. The project involved complex simulations for grass, vines, and blooming sequences. A perfect example of how we combine technical tools with <bold>creative-led direction</bold>.

motherland.description: In collaboration with FOLKS, we were in charge of a wide variety of <bold>supernatural <red>FX</red></bold>. Our tasks included creating tornadoes, explosions, and realistic blood simulations. We also managed complex flocking systems for bats and dynamic debris particles. The project required a high level of versatility to handle diverse magical elements. Technical expertise applied to high-end <bold>television storytelling</bold> and world-building.

umbrella.description: In collaboration with FOLKS, we managed several high-impact <bold>practical effects</bold>. Our team was responsible for the technical simulation of realistic flamethrowers. We also handled complex glass shattering and object destruction throughout the scenes. The work included the development of dynamic smoke and atmospheric debris systems. <bold>Senzo's execution</bold> for one of Netflix's most popular and stylized superhero series.

avatar.description: In collaboration with Netflix, we spearheaded the technical execution of the complex <bold>elemental-bending <red>FX</red></bold>. Our team developed advanced fluid simulations for waterbending and high-velocity smoke and air systems for airbending maneuvers. We also managed the creature <red>FX</red> and grooming for Appa, ensuring photorealistic fur dynamics during high-altitude flight. The project showcased our ability to integrate procedural environments with high-stakes character action. A pinnacle of <bold>elemental simulation</bold> and creature feature execution for a global streaming phenomenon.
